about.title: About Me
about.p1: I build things — from electronics with ESP32 and PCB design to 3D printing and web apps. I'm interested in cybersecurity because I like understanding how systems work from the inside and finding their weak spots.
about.p2: In my projects I mainly use TypeScript, Next.js and Tailwind CSS. I'm currently on Fedora 43 KDE Plasma, after two years of using Arch Linux with Hyprland.
about.p3: Other than that, I play chess, train kickboxing and read about engineering and physics

metadata.description: Portfolio of Tomasz Tłusty – web projects, cybersecurity, hardware (ESP32, PCB), Next.js and TypeScript apps.
metadata.ogDescription: Web projects, cybersecurity and hardware. See my work.
